trials.observed_outcome: not invocable from a non-interactive Python probe; no real invocation attempt could be made
not invocable from a non-interactive Python probe; no real invocation attempt could be made

authoritative_prior.statement: The SendMessage tool is only available when agent teams are enabled via CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1.

resolution: INCONCLUSIVE_NONINTERACTIVE: a real invocation spike requires an interactive Agent Teams session and could not be performed from this non-interactive context. Per DL-031/A-DOC-AUTHORITATIVE, defer to the official doc (gated behind Teams). The prior result-string-scrape claim of 'available:true' with Teams UNSET is NOT reproduced here: it was advertisement, not an invocation outcome. Interactive re-test is required to claim any runtime divergence.
operational_risk: LOW: the substrate does not depend on SendMessage. DL-009 resume re-invokes the entry point; SendMessage is not adopted as a resume mechanism. This gate only matters if the substrate ever delegates session-scoped resume to native SendMessage.
live_probe_instructions: Interactive re-test: in a Claude session, (1) with CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS unset, spawn a subagent and attempt SendMessage(to=<agentId>); record success vs error class. (2) Repeat with the env set to 1. Fill trials[].observed_outcome and set verdict to GATED_BY_TEAMS or RUNTIME_DIVERGENCE accordingly.
